articles.title: BoE: Stronger data versus easing path – Standard Chartered
articles.snippet: Standard Chartered economists Christopher Graham and Saabir Salad argue that stronger UK activity data in early 2026 raises questions about how quickly the Bank of England will cut rates.

combined_text:
[0.67] BoE: Stronger data versus easing path – Standard Chartered
Standard Chartered economists Christopher Graham and Saabir Salad argue that stronger UK activity data in early 2026 raises questions about how quickly the Bank of England will cut rates.
